nodes.label: RizeMobile XcodeGen Project Config
nodes.rationale: RIZ-56: Config.example.xcconfig as base xcconfig with gitignored Config.local.xcconfig overrides; pipes RIZE_BACKEND_BASE_URL into Info.plist. Contains a placeholder (not yet active) for the DeviceActivityReport and DeviceActivityMonitor extension targets, deferred until Apple approves the family-controls entitlement (RIZ-20).

edges.source_location: Placeholder: DeviceActivity / FamilyControls extension targets comment
